property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: testSolveLinearSystem_3x3_uniqueSolution
testcase.system-out: ConstantsLoader: Initiating constants loading process... ConstantsLoader: Cache loaded from C:\Users\2401a/.scientific_calculator/cached_constants.json ConstantsLoader Debug: Constants loaded from cache: 19 constants. ConstantsLoader: Constants loaded successfully from local cache.

testcase.name: testSolveCubic_degeneratesToQuadratic

failure.message: Expected quadratic roots 1 and 2 ==> expected: <x₁=2, x₂=1> but was: <x₁ = 2, x₂ = 1>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Expected quadratic roots 1 and 2 ==> expected: <x₁=2, x₂=1> but was: <x₁ = 2, x₂ = 1> at testcase.name: testSolveCubic_oneRealRoot

failure.message: Expected one real root and two complex ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.name: testSolveQuadratic_twoRealRoots

failure.message: Expected roots 1 and 2 ==> expected: <x₁=2, x₂=1> but was: <x₁ = 2, x₂ = 1>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Expected roots 1 and 2 ==> expected: <x₁=2, x₂=1> but was: <x₁ = 2, x₂ = 1> at
